title: rauvolfia verticillata
intro: Rauvolfia verticillata, also known as the Sarpagandha, is a perennial climber native to the tropical regions of the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a sedative. The health benefits of Rauvolfia verticillata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, insomnia, and epilepsy, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Rauvolfia verticillata is often used in the form of dried roots, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
